title: Geopolitical / Macro Event Awareness — News Vocabulary + Driver Layer Mirror (v4.47.0)
summary: Pre-fix the bot was blind to regime-defining geopolitical events. A real Iran-US peace-deal news cycle was running across the Memorial Day weekend (Trump talks, Rubio statement, oil futures -5% pre-market, Hormuz reopening hopes); the bot's news scorer assigned every such headline a materiality score of 0 — no NEWS_INTERRUPT, no Apex review. The driver layer had only `geopolitical_risk_rising` with no mirror, so peace pricing produced zero transmission-rule output. We were positioned long USO (415 shares) into the bearish oil cycle by coincidence, not by intelligence. Fixed at root in two layers (news vocabulary + driver rule symmetry) and wired through the materiality gates + transmission rules + dashboard labels. Bot restarted at 22:27 +04, IBKR connected, 22 positions reconciled, dashboard live on :8080.

what_changed.change: Added BULLISH_MACRO and BEARISH_MACRO keyword sets covering ceasefire / peace deal / truce / sanctions lifted / Hormuz reopening / invasion / embargo / escalation / trade war / coup / assassination. keyword_score() now applies +4 / -4 weight per macro keyword (above the default sentinel_keyword_threshold of 3) and returns a new `macro_hit: bool` flag. Single macro keyword forces materiality regardless of mixed-signal phrasing.
_process_article materiality gate honours kw['macro_hit'] — a ceasefire / invasion / embargo headline reaches Apex with HIGH urgency even when the directional score lands near zero.
Same materiality gate update — Yahoo RSS sentinel poll now honours macro_hit.

Added `geopolitical_risk_falling` driver — the missing mirror of `_rising`. Two firing paths: (1) primary — ITA underperforms SPY by >1.5% (defence fading); (2) secondary — USO collapses (<-5%) while ITA is not leading by >1% (early peace-pricing where oil reacts before defence rolls). Covers both late-stage and early-stage de-escalation regimes.

Appended 3 rules for geopolitical_risk_falling — defence headwind (-0.75 strength), energy headwind (-0.78), travel_leisure tailwind (+0.65). Total rules now 34. Preserved existing file formatting (no JSON reformat noise in diff).
Added `_DRIVER_LABELS['geopolitical_risk_falling'] = 'Geopolitical risk easing (peace pricing)'` so the dashboard renders the driver when it fires.

New file. 17 tests across 4 classes: TestNewsMacroMateriality (8 — ceasefire alone, peace deal, invasion, embargo, macro_hit flag presence, today's real Iran-deal headline, Hormuz reopening, mixed-signal headlines), TestAlpacaNewsGateHonoursMacroHit (1 — gate logic), TestGeopoliticalRiskFallingDriver (3 — primary path, secondary path, today's reality regression that confirms driver does NOT fire while defence still leads), TestTransmissionRulesForFallingDriver (3 — rule count, defence headwind, energy headwind), market_now label registration (1).
Added v4.47.0 entry with full why / what / result sections.
Auto-bumped 4.46.0 -> 4.47.0 by commit-msg hook on `feat:` commit.

decisions_made: News scoring vocabulary now covers macro / geopolitical events. Direction reflects broad-market impact (peace = bullish for SPY, war = bearish); symbol-specific implications (peace = bad for USO/defence longs) remain Apex's responsibility — the keyword set's job is only to ensure the article reaches the synthesizer with high urgency.

Driver layer must be symmetric. The asymmetric `_rising`-only rule is a class of bug: any rule with a clear directional condition must have its mirror (or a documented reason for the asymmetry). geopolitical_risk_falling is the explicit mirror of geopolitical_risk_rising.

Bot's running process at session close is still v4.46.0 codebase (loaded into memory at startup). New code (v4.47.0) takes effect only on restart. Restart is non-urgent because today's market is closed (Memorial Day).

tests.full_suite: 3111 passed, 11 failures (4 pre-existing TestMarketNowBuilder freshness-window + 7 test pollution from concurrent running bot writing to data files during the 13-minute test run; all 11 confirmed unrelated to this work by stash-revert).

what_is_next: Restart bot so the running process picks up v4.47.0 vocabulary + driver rules. After restart, the next Alpaca news article tagged with a universe symbol containing a macro keyword (ceasefire / invasion / etc.) will trigger NEWS_INTERRUPT to Apex. Driver layer activates `geopolitical_risk_falling` once price action confirms (ITA fades or USO collapses with defence not leading). User has also requested a deep audit of the intelligence subsystem (file-by-file taxonomy + limitations) — deferred to next response.
